# GoodFixture

## Overview
Fixture project for testing.

## Architecture
Single-component test fixture.

## Features
- Test feature 1

## Configuration
- `Test:Key` — test value (default `none`)

## API Endpoints
### REST API
- `GET /test` — returns 200

## Project Structure
```
GoodFixture/
  src/
  tests/
```

## Development
### Prerequisites
- bash
### Getting Started
- Run the tests.

## Deployment
- Image: `goodfixture:latest`

## Ports
| Service | Host | Container |
|---|---|---|
| HTTP | 9999 | 8080 |
